


```{r}

mdb.test <- job_mimedb("^L-Glutamine$")
mdb.test <- step1(mdb.test)


test <- .format_mimedb_html_data("~/Downloads/MiMeDB_ Showing metabocard for L-Glutamine (MMDBc0000129).html")
test

id <- mdb.test$ids
id

link <- start_drive()
link$open()
url <- glue::glue("https://mimedb.org/metabolites/{id}")
link$navigate(url)

res <- pbapply::pbsapply(query, simplify = FALSE,
  function(id) {
    url <- glue::glue("http://bioinfo.life.hust.edu.cn/hTFtarget#!/targets/gene?gene={id}")
    link$navigate(url)
    message(glue::glue("Navigate: {url}"))
    Sys.sleep(1.5)
    content <- link$getPageSource()[[1]]
    html <- e(rvest::read_html(content))
    data <- e(rvest::html_table(html)[[1]])
  }, cl = cl)
res <- rbind_list(res, "target_ensembl")
link$close()
end_drive()

```
